programme.title: Sesame Street
programme.desc: Ernie is throwing Bert a party! He's so excited to make it a fun day for Bert, but Bert is getting increasingly frustrated because he just wanted a quiet day.

programme.title: Daniel Tiger's Neighbourhood
programme.sub-title: Jodi Makes a Boat with Max
programme.desc: Jodi and Nana see Teacher Harriet and Max playing with a homemade boat. Jodi uses things she finds in nature to make one, too.

programme.title: Bananas in Pyjamas
programme.desc: The Bananas trick the Teddies by copying everything they do. But Lulu tricks the Bananas back by asking them to copy things they can't do.

programme.title: Bananas in Pyjamas
programme.desc: The Bananas find strange footprints in the sand and decide to track them. The Teddies join in. Gradually they come to believe that the tracks are of a terrifying monster.

programme.title: Bing
programme.desc: Bing's broken his arm. Petting Arlo, doing his blocks and even drinking juice hurts. Amma explains that it's okay to ask for help.

programme.title: Fizzy and Suds
programme.desc: Fizzy and Suds visit the doll hospital where our little doll is carefully attended to by the doll doctor. Then, they enjoy a tea party picnic with all their favourite dolly friends.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Daddy Pig hangs his clean football shirt out to dry, but Peppa, George, and Mummy splash it with mud. They put it in the wash, but Peppa puts her red dress in too, which makes Daddy's shirt pink.

programme.title: Ready, Steady, Wiggle!
programme.desc: Get ready for an exciting adventure by the sea in 'Wiggle Bay'! Enjoy some dancing fun with Caterina, John, and Tsehay. Then, sing, and count along with 'Five Little Joeys Jumping on the Bed'.

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep
programme.desc: When Bitzer injures his foot and can't work, the farmer chooses the pigs to take over his role!

programme.title: Spidey and His Amazing Friends
programme.desc: Meet new hero, Captain America, and new baddie, Hydro-Man.

programme.title: Supertato
programme.desc: While hunting for the legendary Lost Candle of Birthdays, Supertato and Tomato are lured into Evil Pea's Cake of Iced Doom.

programme.title: Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: Holly is left in charge when King and Queen Thistle go away on important business, but ruling the Little Kingdom isn't as easy as it looks.

programme.title: Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: Ben and Holly are excited when they learn that Nanny Plum is a Tooth Fairy at night, and go along with her to pick up a little girl's tooth. But the little girl is not so little, she's a human and much bigger than them.

programme.title: Flower and Flour
programme.desc: While Flower, Penny, and Dirk head out for the day, Flour the cat sneaks off on his own mischievous adventure around the plaza.

programme.title: Flower and Flour
programme.desc: Flower must bring a dish representing her family to a school picnic, but how can she choose when she loves both Dad's Austrian and Mum's Cantonese cooking equally? Time to get creative!

programme.title: Ariel
programme.desc: Remy doesn't follow the rules.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Grandpa Pig is rushed to the hospital after hurting himself. An X-ray shows nothing is broken, but the Doctor recommends he stay overnight just in case, like a sleepover!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa, Suzy and Granny Pig are visiting Grandpa Pig in the hospital today. After the Doctor's assessment, it is decided that he is now well enough to go home.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Bingo and Bluey want Mum and Dad to smoochy kiss, so they set up a romantic evening for two at their fancy restaurant. Everything goes to plan, until chef Bingo's special arrives.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: The Heelers take a long riverside walk, but Bingo's legs are tired and she wants a piggyback. To distract her, Mum and Dad invent fun games and get her little legs moving again.

programme.title: Knee High Spies
programme.desc: It's a great train robbery as Silver Paw hijacks Lauchie's toy train so she can steal pet treats from the kitchen, while Moss plays train driver to try and bring it home.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops
programme.desc: Bryan the ferry can't stop unless Mojo and Bo figure out how to get aboard and help him!

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: When Eugene unexpectedly drops out of running the Summer Fair, Duggee and the Squirrels hold an election to decide who's the best candidate for the job.

programme.title: Gardening Australia Junior
programme.desc: Traditional Owners Connie and her granddaughter, Gleesyanna, take Clarence on a journey through Kakadu's incredible plant life and introduce him to the six seasons of Kakadu.

programme.title: Play School: Playtime with Pets
programme.desc: Emma and Rachael meet different underwater pets, from goldfish to hermit crabs to an amazing axolotl! Humpty pretends to be a hermit crab looking for a new shell, and Rachael makes a colourful fish mobile.

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.desc: When filming a tourism advert about Pontypandy, Sarah gets carried away with her filming. When she climbs a mountain to get the perfect shot, she ends up stranded on a ledge.

programme.title: Builder Brothers' Dream Factory
programme.desc: When Moose is too scared to sleep out in the woods with the rest of the Nature Guide Troupe, the Crew uses materials they find in nature to build a \.

programme.title: Millie Magnificent
programme.desc: Discovering the importance of bees, Millie and her friends build a bee hotel to welcome buzzy guests into the community garden.

programme.title: The Snail and the Whale
programme.desc: A beautiful tale of an unlikely friendship, a tour of the world and a heroic rescue. Based on the picture book written by Julia Donaldson and illustrated by Axel Scheffler.

programme.title: Kiri and Lou
programme.desc: Lou helps Sorry with her anxiety.

programme.title: Nikhil & Jay
programme.sub-title: Nikhil and Jay and the Deepavali Fireworks
programme.desc: Nikhil and Jay celebrate Deepavali (Diwali) with their family, with kolam, laddus and bunting. But will they be able to watch the fireworks without scaring Max the Cat?

programme.title: Bananas in Pyjamas
programme.desc: When Rat and Topsy find a pretty shell on the beach, they both want to keep it.

programme.title: Sesame Street
programme.desc: When the only ramp on Sesame Street is already being used, Elmo and Rosita wonder if they can make a ramp out of cardboard to race their ping-pong balls. Let's try!

programme.title: Ready, Steady, Wiggle!
programme.sub-title: If You're Happy and You Know It
programme.desc: It's a very happy day in Wiggle Town as John and Lachy are in the Wiggly Kitchen and find a flower with yellow petals, but they're not sure what flower it could be.

programme.title: Andy and the Band
programme.desc: With less an hour to go, the band and students launch into action to put on the best show possible to save the school. Little do they know, some Rock Star Magic might help...

programme.title: Numberblocks
programme.desc: It's time for the biggest adventure of all - there's a whole universe to explore. Get ready to be a number explorer with everything you've learned from the Numberblocks.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: The old cuckoo clock in Peppa and George's bedroom hasn't worked for sometime. So, Daddy Pig winds it up. The clock strikes the hour and a wooden cuckoo pops out. Peppa thinks it's funny, but George missed the whole thing.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and George are going ice-skating today. They have never been ice-skating before and Peppa keeps falling over.

programme.title: Kiri and Lou
programme.desc: Kiri and Lou decide to go swimming but the water is too cold for Lou. When Kiri splashes him and laughs, Lou's feelings are hurt.

programme.title: Ginger and the Vegesaurs
programme.desc: The baby Pea-Rexess are fighting over who gets to play with their recently discovered rock, seeing the squabble, Ginger arranges a timeshare deal, letting each of their personalities shine.

programme.title: Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: Holly takes some frogspawn home from class to look after, but is surprised when the frogspawn has turned into tadpoles by morning. Soon there are lots of little frogs for Holly to look after!

programme.title: Vida the Vet
programme.desc: Otto wants Sylvie to join him in the Puddle Parade, but butterflies can't fly with wet wings!

programme.title: Maddie + Triggs
programme.desc: While helping Mum babysit their neighbour Sally, Maddie + Triggs learn that words can sometimes be confusing, especially if they're coming from the mouth of a mischevious toddler.

programme.title: Maddie + Triggs
programme.desc: It's a rainy day and Maddie + Triggs are bored, but when they start to really listen to all the tiny sounds in their house, they soon discover the music of the treasure indoors.

programme.title: Stan Can
programme.desc: Ari asks Stanley to clear lots of fallen leaves from the school playground. Stanley finds it harder than he thought so invents a super leaf blower which soon blows all of the leaves from the playground into his van.

programme.title: Octonauts
programme.sub-title: The Octonauts and the Crafty Cuttlefish
programme.desc: The Octonauts are on a mission to recover Captain Barnacles lost Octo-compass, but its been taken by a crafty, shape-shifting Cuttlefish.

programme.title: PJ Masks
programme.desc: To get his ship back from Octobella, Pirate Robot becomes the captain of the PJMs. But can he be a good captain?

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: One of the chickens is laying her eggs. The chick's legs pop out of the bottom of the egg. Oh dear, it's a little bit stuck! Wait a minute - the egg is running off. Can the squirrels help bring it back to the chicken safely?

programme.title: Kangaroo Beach
programme.desc: The cadets become stranded on Boomerang Island, but Neville vows to save the day with his backpack of supplies and emergency underpants.

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.desc: Hannah and Norman help at the Pontypandy Vets but end up losing the sheep and Prince the horse, who gets stuck in sinking mud at the tidal flats!

programme.title: Peter Rabbit
programme.desc: When Peter is asked to watch Jemima's egg, he discovers that babysitting is far more dangerous than he could ever have imagined.

programme.title: Mister Maker Around the World
programme.desc: Mister Maker travels the world and meets lots of Mini Makers along the way. In Australia, find out if he can make an egg-cellent egg diver and in Hong Kong, discover how to make some really handy art!

programme.title: Ready, Steady, Wiggle!
programme.desc: Join The Wiggles as they share their favourite things. Evie contacts the manager of her favourite band to arrange a special performance by The Carrot Sticks. Get ready for an unforgettable show!

programme.title: Play School: Big Ted's Time Machine
programme.desc: Step back in time to the swinging 60s with Justine and Alex where they meet Play School icon, Monica! Big Ted plays hide and seek, and hopscotch with the other toys. They have fondue for lunch.

programme.title: Tummy Tom 2: A New Friend For Tummy Tom
programme.desc: Follow Tummy Tom and Cat Mouse on a beautiful snowy winter's day, when a new dog on the block turns their life upside down.

programme.title: Little J & Big Cuz
programme.desc: Big Cuz's fundraising sausage sizzle is a slapstick disaster when Old Dog steals the sausages.

programme.title: Gardening Australia Junior
programme.desc: You can still have a green thumb if you don't have a garden. Tammy and Pia build their very own rainforest for the bathroom, which will thrive off all the moisture and steam to grow rich ferns.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa, George, Mummy and Daddy Pig go to visit Madame Gazelle. The family soon realise that her house is being pushed over by the tall tree next to it.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Daddy Pig receives a letter saying he must go away on business to test some very important concrete. Peppa, Mummy and George all decide to go with Daddy and enjoy a very long train journey.

programme.title: The Adventures of Paddington
programme.desc: The Browns take Paddington to London as a special treat for his birthday but they lose him on the way. Paddington ends up in the Tower of London aned has a close encounter with the Crown Jewels.

programme.title: Super Monsters
programme.desc: Frankie and friends help Mr. Mash conquer stage fright with teamwork, creating a magical and memorable talent show.

programme.title: Super Monsters
programme.desc: The Super Monsters learn empathy and kindness while bringing Doyle, the runaway gargoyle, back home.

programme.title: Octonauts
programme.sub-title: The Octonauts and the Fiddler Crabs
programme.desc: The Octonauts help clean up a beach after a storm, but things get complicated when the resident fiddler crabs hijack the Gup-D!

programme.title: Knee High Spies
programme.desc: Mum has set up the playroom as a puzzle room for the kids, but when Pranksy locks the door, the spies must play all the puzzles to escape.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Grandad is supposed to be resting, but when Bluey and Bingo go to visit him, he makes a run for it with the kids and takes them on a madcap adventure into the bush.

programme.title: The Adventures of Paddington
programme.desc: Jonathan, Judy and Paddington accidentally break Mrs Bird's much-loved rocking chair. How will they fix it before she finds out?

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club
programme.desc: It's fun on the counting train until Naughty Monkey starts to drive! Ethel makes a shape, Frog drops beats with a Ribbit Song and Enid turns anime, to chase after the mouse.

programme.title: Supertato
programme.desc: Supertato shows the Grape Kids how to camp Supertato-style, but Evil Pea arrives and wows them with her ice camping. Before long, the Grape Kids need to be rescued by Supertato.

programme.title: Piripenguins
programme.desc: The Piris join a treasure hunt competition, but is 'Captain Krill' all that he appears?

programme.title: Let's Go Bananas!
programme.desc: On Dad's first day as a stay-at-home parent, Stellar is the teacher who shows him parenting is a breeze!

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: As Bluey and Bingo squabble over their magic xylophone, which has the power to freeze Dad in space and time, Dad seizes control and freezes Bluey, leaving Bingo as her only hope.

programme.title: The InBESTigators
programme.sub-title: The Case of the Science Sabotage
programme.desc: When Annie's science fair experiment is stolen, the Inbestigators must track it down before the judging commences.

programme.title: Caper Crew
programme.desc: When Ophelbert's beloved Guinea Pig is confiscated by scary canteen lady Gretchen, the kids plan a breakout from the local pound, with some much-needed help from Queenie.

programme.title: Secrets At Red Rocks
programme.desc: Jake follows Cara to learn more about the magnetic woman and her odd behaviour. But soon the tables turn and Cara is tracking him. She wants the skin.

programme.title: Animal Park
programme.desc: It's a Christmas miracle - an Aardvark baby just before Christmas. However, it' a nerve-wracking time for the keepers who take the decision to raise the baby themselves.

programme.title: Animal Park
programme.desc: A yule log for the lions and how do you take a pancake tortoise festive family photo?

programme.title: Secrets of the Zoo
programme.desc: A cheetah fights for its life against a mysterious and debilitating illness, and an elephant is artificially inseminated.

programme.title: Merlin
programme.desc: With Merlin gravely ill from the Serket's poison, Morgana and Morgause continue with their evil plan. They have mentally incapacitated Uther and convinced his enemy, Cenred, to invade Camelot.

programme.title: Ultimate Vets
programme.desc: A cygnet needs urgent help after swallowing fishing wire, old favourite Bambi the Pomeranian is back to see Cheryl for a big operation and Reggie the cat is causing a real stink.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug & Cat Noir
programme.desc: Jagged Stone's assistant Penny gets akumatised into Troublemaker. She used to solve other people's problems, now she's going to cause all the problems. Ladybug and Cat Noir must stop her before she gets everyone into trouble.

programme.title: Total DramaRama
programme.desc: After Cody's best friend doll breaks on their watch, Owen and Beth put themselves in grave danger while trying to do the right thing.

programme.title: We Bare Bears
programme.desc: When the city plans to destroy the Bears' cave in order to make way for a new cell phone tower, Grizz and Panda must find evidence from their past that proves they have rights to their land.

programme.title: We Bare Bears
programme.desc: The Bears turn their cave into a popular coffee shop.

programme.title: We Bare Bears
programme.desc: The Bears and their friends upload more videos.

programme.title: We Baby Bears
programme.desc: The Bears enter Panda into a fashion contest, but he's got some fierce competition when Madam Malin and Madeline show up!

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.sub-title: A Full-Throttle Battle! The Vengeful Golden Frieza
programme.desc: Not to be outdone by Goku's new form, Frieza reveals a new one of his own. Once again the two face off in an evenly matched battle. Meanwhile, Beerus and Whis make their way to Earth.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.sub-title: A Chance Appears In A Tight Spot! Launch A Counteroffensive, Goku!
programme.desc: Goku is having trouble facing Golden Frieza until he realises the other is quickly losing stamina. Gaining the upper hand, Goku gives Frieza a chance to leave Earth.

programme.title: The Powerpuff Girls
programme.desc: Blossom's fear of the dentist's drill causes her to avoid it at all costs.

programme.title: The Next Step
programme.desc: Anthony is put in a tough position when Ariana asks to be let back on the team. Ethan works toward something new and Ebby has her first date with Remy.

programme.title: Horrible Histories
programme.desc: From the Trojan Horse, to Jason and his Argonauts going to find the Golden Fleece, and Zeus going on historical first dates as an ant, Horrible Histories presents mythical mayhem, Greek style!

programme.title: The InBESTigators
programme.sub-title: The Case of the Baffling Birthday
programme.desc: Ava wants to give Maudie her first proper birthday party, but Maudie gets sidetracked by a mystery.

programme.title: Odd Squad
programme.desc: Olive and Otto help Ms O host a lunch for some very important but easily offended guests.

programme.title: Odd Squad
programme.desc: In order to save humanity, Olive and Otto must locate a treasure chest that Oscar buried.

programme.title: ABC Kids Programs resume at 4am
programme.desc: ABC Kids programs resume at 4.00am.

programme.title: Young Jedi Adventures
programme.desc: When Taborr tries to steal from Starlight Beacon, it's up to the young Jedi to stop him.

programme.title: Octonauts: Above and Beyond
programme.desc: When Paani goes missing in the desert while searching for water, Dashi will need backup to help find him before he runs out of water.

programme.title: Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: It is harvest day. The elves and fairies enlist the help of Mr Gnome in picking blackberries. If only they could stop him from eating them all.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po enjoy a game of musical statues. It takes the Teletubbies a few turns to work out what to do when the music stops; they must stand very still.

programme.title: Sesame Street
programme.desc: Cookie Monster is feeling sad he had to miss Sunday mini-golf, so Abby poofs up a mini-golf course on Sesame Street for him to play.

programme.title: Hey Duggee Songs
programme.desc: It's sing-a-long time with Duggee and the Squirrels! Sing and dance with these original songs from Hey Duggee.

programme.title: Daniel Tiger's Neighbourhood
programme.desc: Daniel is excited to go on a boat ride, but rushes and breaks his toy boat. Grandpere shows him that it's good to go slow.

programme.title: Bananas in Pyjamas
programme.desc: Rat decides to make a film - Jungle Rat - in which he is to be the hero. But the Banana camera crew end up staging the rescue and starring in the show themselves.

programme.title: Bananas in Pyjamas
programme.desc: The Bananas are trying to complete a jigsaw puzzle on their own. The Teddies pop over for a game of hide and seek.

programme.title: Bing
programme.desc: Bing and Sula are putting on a puppet show when Coco interrupts the story and joins in. Bing is frustrated, and his loud Biteysaurus isn't welcome, as he is hurting Sula's ears.

programme.title: Fizzy and Suds
programme.desc: Balls are so much fun to play with! Bowling balls, bouncing balls, basketballs, disco balls. Fizzy and Suds play with all their favourite balls.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and George go on a boat trip with Grandpa Pig, but they must send Polly Parrot for help when their boat runs aground. Polly fetches Granny Pig and Grandad Dog, who rescues them in his boat.

programme.title: Ready, Steady, Wiggle!
programme.desc: Get ready for an exciting adventure by the sea in 'Wiggle Bay'! Enjoy some dancing fun with Caterina, John, and Tsehay. Then, sing, and count along with 'Five Little Joeys Jumping on the Bed'.

programme.title: Play School Dance It Out
programme.desc: Are you ready to do the Changey Change? Takaya shows us how to salsa dance and make different shapes with his body as he moves along to Changes!

programme.title: The Adventures of Paddington
programme.desc: Paddington has to choose between England and Peru before their football cup match, but he loves both places equally.

programme.title: Peter Rabbit
programme.sub-title: The Tale of Old Brown's New Roost
programme.desc: When Old Brown quits Owl Island in search of some peace and quiet, his new roost turns out to be a little too close to home for Peter, Lily and Benjamin.

programme.title: PJ Masks Power Heroes
programme.desc: Catboy wants to prove himself a fast driver so powers his cat racer with a moon crystal and blasts into space.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops
programme.desc: A shark in Swoppiton? Mojo and Bo go on a fishing trip to find out!

programme.title: Vida the Vet
programme.desc: Sunny has trouble falling asleep at the clinic, so Vida gathers all his comforts of home to help.

programme.title: Flower and Flour
programme.desc: After discovering a crop of colourful little wildflowers sprouting under the Welcome Arch, Flower and Neha think there's only one possible explanation - fairies!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.sub-title: The Biggest Picture in the World
programme.desc: Super Potato is hosting a picnic but as he begins to tell his stories, the children have multiple requests for him to fulfil including flying everyone home!

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: When Bingo drops Mum's breakfast-in-bed on the floor, she's convinced she's ruined her big day. But Bluey helps make amends by putting on a play of how Mum and Dad first met.

programme.title: Ginger and the Vegesaurs
programme.desc: During a snowball fight, Ginger and the Pea-Rexes accidentally wake up a Kiwimammuthus from its hibernation and have to tire out the furry beast to get it back to sleep.

programme.title: Kangaroo Beach
programme.desc: When Spyke introduces Neville to his alter ego Daredevil Neville, her fun-filled Splash Bash take a dangerous turn.

programme.title: Ariel
programme.desc: Sebastian tries to relax for a day.

programme.title: Octonauts
programme.desc: Kwazii and Dashi become entangled in a strange deep-sea creature - a siphonophore - and when a geyser blasts it toward the surface, the Octonauts must stop its ascent before it fatally bursts.

programme.title: Play School Dance It Out
programme.desc: Are you ready to do the Changey Change? Takaya shows us how to salsa dance and make different shapes with his body as he moves along to Changes!

programme.title: Play School
programme.desc: Teo and Miah see behind the scenes of a gardening show, filmed by the toys. Miah presents a 'What to Wear' weather report and Teo plays the talented performers on a TV singing competition.

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.sub-title: The Way of the Wild Walkers
programme.desc: When Peter creates a wild and adventurous trail for Scoop Dooley to follow, they both end up getting lost.

programme.title: Knee High Spies
programme.desc: The spies try to stop Scarlett's homework being fed to the family dog Mazey, but can Deena learn how to bond with the beloved pet?

programme.title: Stan Can
programme.desc: Stanley must keep Myrtle's pumpkin safe from Speedy the snail.

programme.title: Nikhil & Jay
programme.sub-title: Nikhil and Jay and the Wonky Welly
programme.desc: Nikhil, Jay and the family have a Welly Wanging competition at the allotment but Nikhil can't throw the welly without it being all wonky!

programme.title: Sesame Street: Nature Explorers
programme.desc: On a nature walk through the park, Tango spots a spider web... but where's the spider? Elmo would LOVE to see a spider and wonders if they can find one.

programme.title: Mittens and Pants
programme.desc: Pants and Popcorn have fun digging the best hole ever, but when they forget to fill it in, Post Pig Petunia falls in and scatters her mail everywhere.

programme.title: BeddyByes
programme.desc: MeMo and BaBa discover a dandelion clock and marvel at how a seed can become a beautiful flower.

programme.title: Mixmups
programme.desc: The Mixmups go on a Magical Biscuit Spoon Tree Adventure to pick some spoon biscuits. But when they come across a rickety bridge and Yapette is too scared to cross, will they find another way to get to it.

programme.title: Ready Eddie Go!
programme.desc: Eddie, Nina and Akil go to the woods to make a den. They learn about planning a project and the teamwork to make it happen.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: As Bluey and Bingo squabble over their magic xylophone, which has the power to freeze Dad in space and time, Dad seizes control and freezes Bluey, leaving Bingo as her only hope.

programme.title: Fizzy and Suds
programme.desc: Fizzy and Suds explore noodles! From pasta to pulled dough, they discover how noodles are made, cooked, and slurped in tasty dishes like stir-fries, soups, and colourful noodle bowls.

programme.title: The Makery
programme.desc: Nim finds some mysterious brightly coloured eggs which inspire her makes today: an eggbox chicken, a baked bug and a pineapple costume.

programme.title: Ready, Steady, Wiggle!
programme.desc: Caterina and Anthony find a rowboat in the Wiggly Kitchen. The Wiggles sing Row, Row, Row Your Boat, and then it's time for the Wiggle Town Dancing Water Police to help with the problem of the day.

programme.title: Andy's Aquatic Adventures
programme.desc: Andy blasts off in his safari sub to Antarctica in search of a Weddell seal and her pup.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops
programme.desc: Why did Mojo and Bo help Ludwig the \.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: The grass has grown very long. It is so long that when Peppa and George play outside with their plastic ball, they can't see each other and the ball gets lost.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and George are going to the dentist for a check-up. Peppa and George's teeth are lovely and clean, but George's plastic toy Mr Dinosaur's teeth are a bit yellow.

programme.title: Kiri and Lou
programme.desc: Kiri feels left out when Lou is playing with their new friend Sorry. But then she discovers how fun it can be to have an imaginary friend.

programme.title: Ginger and the Vegesaurs
programme.desc: A volcanic explosion in a neighbouring valley has caused a family of Sweet Potatodons to move into Lava Land, much to the chagrin of their savoury cousins.

programme.title: Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: The children are at the Elf Farm, but to learn where milk comes from they must visit a Big Farm, to find cows. They travel to Lucy Big's Farm, where she shows them all the animals.

programme.title: Vida the Vet
programme.desc: It's Popcorn's birthday! Vida wants to surprise him, but misses his help AND his friendship.

programme.title: Maddie + Triggs
programme.desc: When Maddie + Triggs realise that all the teaspoons have gone missing from the kitchen, Maddie figures out a surprisingly musical way to get them back where they belong.

programme.title: Maddie + Triggs
programme.desc: During a family hiking trip, Dad is adamant that he does not want his pristine hiking shoes getting dirty; can Maddie plot a route and help her buddy avoid getting muddy?

programme.title: Stan Can
programme.desc: Cynthia is working on the bus so asks Stanley to take her passengers to the Community centre. Seamus, Little Woo, Fred and Fifi are going to play football and have a lot of equipment.

programme.title: Octonauts
programme.sub-title: The Octonauts and the Lost Lemon Shark
programme.desc: The Octonauts have their hands full as they look after a headstrong young Lemon Shark who's hurt his nose and can't find his way home.

programme.title: PJ Masks
programme.desc: Catboy wants to try out his Cat Stripe King incredible speed.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: Duggee's nephew Dudley comes to stay. He's one cute puppy, but he looks like he could cause chaos in the clubhouse. The squirrels come up with lots of imaginative ways to entertain him.

programme.title: Kangaroo Beach
programme.desc: When Spyke introduces Neville to his alter ego Daredevil Neville, her fun-filled Splash Bash take a dangerous turn.

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.desc: When a class tour of the airport goes wrong, it's up to Norman to use his gaming skills to control FireSwift until the Rescue Team arrives!

programme.title: Peter Rabbit
programme.sub-title: The Tale of the Lucky Four Leaf Clover
programme.desc: When Benjamin finds a four-leaf clover, Peter tricks him into thinking it brings good luck. It's harmless fun until Peter's prank accidentally leads Lily into Mr Tod's dangerous clutches.

programme.title: Sesame Street: Nature Explorers
programme.desc: Tango leads the Nature Explorers to a bird's nest, and to their surprise, they found something even more exciting - a robin family!

programme.title: Daniel Tiger's Neighbourhood
programme.desc: Daniel is very excited when Prince Tuesday returns home from college for a visit. Prince Wednesday, however, is upset that Daniel is paying more attention to his big brother than to him.

programme.title: The Makery
programme.desc: Nim has dreams of becoming an opera singer. Between singing practice, she makes a scurry bug, a baked stained-glass window cookie and a monster cushion.

programme.title: Play School
programme.desc: Alex, Rachael, Kiya and Jemima fly the Explorer Mobile to the moon. Dr Karl and Rachael have fun testing the Bottle Diver experiment. Through the windows, we explore a colourful coral reef.

programme.title: Ready, Steady, Wiggle!
programme.desc: Start the day in the sunshine with 'The Garden Dance (The Ants Are Marching)'. Tsehay shares her rap with Lucia, then Simon, Lachy, and Anthony sing with dancing roses for Dorothy.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends: Big World!
programme.desc: Thomas meets another big blue engine in Brazil that reminds him of Gordon.

programme.title: Tish Tash
programme.desc: At the end of a library trip and agreeing to meet Rosa at the front entrance, Tish realises she needs help finding a book about pyramids.

programme.title: Tish Tash
programme.desc: Tish, Cori and Tobby visit Jeffy's house. Jeffy, unfortunately, is not in a good mood due to a damaged toy. Tish, Cori and Tobby decide they'll work together to cheer her up.

programme.title: Ginger and the Vegesaurs
programme.desc: Ginger's baby Broccolisaurus friend kicks their ball into Potatodon territory. Now they have challenge the Potatodons to a game to win it back.

programme.title: Play School Dance It Out
programme.desc: Are you ready to Clap Stamp La Cha? Emma is making music with her body as she stamps, claps and sings along to the music! Get ready to cha cha along to Mi Cuerpo!

programme.title: Andy's Dinosaur Adventures
programme.desc: Andy travels back in time 220 million years to the time of coelophysis, one of the earliest dinosaurs that hunted in packs and was an expert at fishing.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops
programme.desc: Did Mojo and Bo paint road lines going in all the wrong directions? Yes they did!

programme.title: Ariel
programme.desc: Ariel helps Ravi at work.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Grandad is supposed to be resting, but when Bluey and Bingo go to visit him, he makes a run for it with the kids and takes them on a madcap adventure into the bush.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: During a hearing test, Peppa's family finds out George needs a hearing aid. After he gets one fitted, George can hear, making everyone happy. Peppa teaches him about sounds.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: PC Panda brings his twin daughters, Peggi and Pandora Panda, to playgroup. They love puzzles and to solve mysteries, just like their dad.

programme.title: Maddie + Triggs
programme.desc: Maddie is feeling lonely during her first visit to chess club, but before long she meets a new friend who helps her turn that desert island feeling into a tropical paradise.

programme.title: Stan and Gran
programme.desc: Stan and Gran are enjoying a beach clean, but the rubbish seems to have a mind of its own! When a yoghurt pot goes walk-about, Stan spies a mystery!

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.desc: A pesky mole causes trouble for Moose when the mole decides that Moose's Wild Man Golf course is the perfect place to build a few molehills.

programme.title: Kangaroo Beach
programme.desc: Inspired by Gemma and her mum smashing their personal best in the ocean, Neville takes on a challenge of his own - teaching his mum, Narelle, how to swim!

programme.title: Octonauts
programme.sub-title: The Octonauts and the Manta Rays
programme.desc: The Octonauts help a young manta ray find the secret manta ray feeding grounds, but when they finally locate it, the Octonauts become caught in the middle of a dangerous feeding frenzy.

programme.title: Spidey and His Amazing Friends
programme.desc: The villains steal Black Panther's super battery and cause trouble in the city.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Mum reminisces about Bluey and Judo as babies. Bluey learnt to roll over first, but Judo was the first to crawl, so then it became a race to see who was going to walk first!

programme.title: Flower and Flour
programme.desc: After discovering a crop of colourful little wildflowers sprouting under the Welcome Arch, Flower and Neha think there's only one possible explanation - fairies!

programme.title: Big Lizard
programme.sub-title: The Day Ammon Overcame Her Fear
programme.desc: If Ammon gets spooked by a tiny insect, how can she summon the bravery to rescue Cosima and Big Lizard from the river rapids?

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: The squirrels learn about how to achieve their ambitions.

programme.title: Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: Lucy and her dad are having a quiet, relaxing day boating on the lake. They fish out an old, glittery mirror from the bottom of the lake and decide to keep it. Unfortunately, the mirror belongs to a mermaid who needs it back.

programme.title: Superbuns
programme.desc: Blossom tries her best to write a story for great stories camp, but she just can't do it because she's so distracted by a super-annoying-buzzing gnat.

programme.title: Batwheels
programme.sub-title: Save The Bat Dance For Me
programme.desc: Redbird is convinced that nobody likes his eccentric dance moves, but when Toyman traps Robin behind a dance-themed gauntlet, it's up to the rambunctious rally car to dance his way to victory.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Doctor Bluey is needed when Dad gets a very curious X-ray from Nurse Bingo. It seems he has a cat in his tummy, leaving Bluey no choice but to operate immediately.

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep
programme.desc: A two-part cliff-hanger where everything that Shaun knows and loves comes into question, when he impulsively makes a wish and must face up to some unexpected consequences.

programme.title: Lego Ninjago Dragons Rising
programme.desc: Lloyd and Wyldfyre lead the escaped dragons in a battle against the Claws while Sora and Arin search for Riyu in hopes of shutting down the Photacs.

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: A Crisis Of Faith And Octopus Aliens
programme.desc: When Mary's faith is shaken by a tragedy in the community, Sheldon becomes an unlikely ally.

programme.title: BtN Newsbreak
programme.desc: Find out what's going on in the world with a news bulletin designed for children, featuring stories that are relevant and easy to understand.

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: A Financial Secret and Fish Sauce
programme.desc: When George Sr asks Sheldon to keep a secret from Mary, the stress of not being honest drives Sheldon to hide out at Tam's for his first sleepover.

programme.title: Gladiators
programme.desc: In the first semi-final, four Contenders battle for a coveted place in the grand final.

programme.title: Kids BBQ Championship
programme.desc: The barbecue arena is transformed into a Polynesian paradise and the kids are challenged to make the perfect luau pork dish with a tropical fruit side.

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli and Duff Goldman bring the fun and stakes of a spelling bee into the kitchen by asking the remaining seven kid bakers to make spelling bee word tarts with assigned words on top.

programme.title: Merlin
programme.desc: Merlin stumbles across a secret chamber and accidentally releases a Goblin. The mischievous creature possesses Gaius, leading the once-wise physician to develop a taste for gold, ale and magical jokes.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug & Cat Noir
programme.desc: A toddler gets akumatised into Gigantitan, a giant baby who crisscrosses Paris looking for a lollipop and destroying everything in his path. Stopping him won't be child's play for Ladybug and Cat Noir.

programme.title: Total DramaRama
programme.desc: After losing countless jobs because of the kids, MacArthur shows up at the school seeking revenge.

programme.title: We Bare Bears
programme.desc: Panda bears have a very adorable (and violent!) sneeze, and Panda is no exception. When a Vine video of his very cute sneeze goes viral, Panda becomes a \.

programme.title: We Bare Bears
programme.desc: The Bears sneak Charlie into a hospital for medical assistance.

programme.title: We Bare Bears
programme.desc: The Bears help Chloe present her project for a college science contest.

programme.title: We Baby Bears
programme.desc: In an endless junkyard the Bears meet Teddi, a sentient teddy bear.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.sub-title: The Earth Explodes?! A Decisive Kamehameha!
programme.desc: With Goku badly injured, Vegeta steps in to face Frieza. Stronger than ever, Vegeta proves to be a challenge, and an enraged Frieza destroys the planet.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.sub-title: The 6th Universe's Destroyer! His Name Is Champa!
programme.desc: Vegeta and Goku are continuing their training under Whis when they receive a pair of visitors - Beerus' brother and Whis' sister. After a comparison of culinary delights, Champa challenges Beerus to a universe tournament.

programme.title: The Powerpuff Girls
programme.desc: When Blossom makes a bad call, she becomes afraid to try again.

programme.title: The Next Step
programme.desc: Eldon chooses the Internationals duet as Kenzie considers a big opportunity. Olive is conflicted about having her friend back on the team.

programme.title: Horrible Histories
programme.desc: Take a journey through one of the weirdest, wildest periods in English history, featuring the only time that a king has been tried and executed for treason.

programme.title: The InBESTigators
programme.sub-title: The Case of the Concert Catastrophe
programme.desc: Maudie is crushed when her tickets to a pop concert go missing, especially since it seems likely that she herself has misplaced them.

programme.title: Odd Squad
programme.desc: The agents throw a surprise party for Ms O.

programme.title: Odd Squad
programme.desc: When the alarm system at headquarters is triggered, Olive, Otto, Ms O, and Oscar must avoid a series of booby traps in order to shut it off.

programme.title: ABC Kids Programs resume at 4am
programme.desc: ABC Kids programs resume at 4.00am.

programme.title: Young Jedi Adventures
programme.desc: The young Jedi are led on a mission by a new Padawan.

programme.title: PJ Masks
programme.desc: When the Wolfies start their own band, their sonic howls create new levels of destruction.

programme.title: Octonauts: Above and Beyond
programme.desc: Pearl and Periwinkle discover a giant carp wreaking havoc on the Great Plains ecosystem. They call the Octonauts in for backup, but catching that giant fish proves to be much harder than it looks.

programme.title: Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: Three baby ladybirds, Amber, Emerald and Keith have come to stay at their uncle Gaston's for the day. The baby ladybirds are exhausting! So Ben and Holly help Gaston to keep them entertained.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The voice trumpet leads a game of I Spy where the Teletubbies have to spot different colours - purple, green, yellow and red. What or who can they spot with those colours?
